body: Buildkite is running on 1.10, so I am not updating it
title: Add 1.12 to ci

body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
add second newton support in IMEX-ARK algorithms: enable solving part of the implicit equation first and then use the solution in solving the rest of the variables.

## To-do
Clean up

title: add second newton support
